remaining_tasks.name: OG card PNG generation (quiz + flavor rarity)
Quiz skip-to-result mode and share text

decisions.decision: PNG not SVG for OG cards
decisions.rationale: Research confirmed SVG og:image is not rendered by any social platform (Twitter, Facebook, iMessage, WhatsApp, Discord, Slack). Using workers-og (satori + resvg-wasm) for PNG generation.
Social crawlers do not execute JavaScript. Worker detects crawler User-Agents and returns minimal HTML with correct og:meta tags.
CONTEXT.md locked decision: flavor share links land on radar.html?flavor=X. radar.html redirects to index.html preserving params. Checker caught initial plan targeting Today page instead.

decisions.decision: UI-SPEC approved with .png endpoints overriding .svg from CONTEXT.md
decisions.rationale: Research-justified technical override. CONTEXT.md specified .svg but that would produce non-functional social cards.

next_action: Run /gsd:execute-phase 34 to execute both plans (wave 1: Worker OG cards, wave 2: frontend share UX)
context_notes: Phase 34 fully planned. Research, UI-SPEC (6/6 dimensions passed after 1 revision), and 2 plans created and verified by checker (passed after 1 revision fixing Radar vs Today page targeting). Plans are clean with no file overlap between waves. Ready for execution.
